effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [discard an Arms card from your hand], draw a card, and this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: They're not an existence that was wished for. Thus they're sealed.

effectEN: [CONT](RC):During the battle this unit attacked a grade 3 or greater unit, this unit gets [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: My stealth lies not within silence.

nameEN: Twin Bullet of Dust Storm, Travis
effectEN: [ACT](RC)1/Turn :If your opponent's rear-guard was retired this turn, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], Soul Charge (1), choose one of your opponent's rear-guards, retire it, and this unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: You can't run. No blind spots exist for my bullets.

effectEN:
Play this with COST  [Soul Blast (1)]!
Choose one of your units in the [overDress] state, and until end of turn, it gets "[AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks a vanguard, Counter Charge (1).".
flavorTextEN: Be released, the infinite power that is reached through prayers.

effectEN: [CONT](Front Row RC):All of your units can attack your opponent's back row rear-guard in the same column as your attacking unit.
flavorTextEN: Your thread of life shall be severed here.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit is boosted, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose one of your opponent's grade 2 or greater rear-guards, retire it, and this unit gets [Power]+2000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: It is no easy feat to break through. Not while being watched.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose one of your opponent's front row rearguards, retire it, and this unit gets [Power]+2000 until end of turn.
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if your vanguard is grade 3 or greater, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], and this unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Let's get excited today too!

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit's attack hits, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose a card from your drop with the [overDress] ability, and return it to your hand.
flavorTextEN: Receiving the prayer filled with wholehearted efforts, the spirit rises once more.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When your grade 0 rear-guard attacks, COST  [Counter Blast (1) & retire this unit], and the unit that attacked gets [Power]+10000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: Like this...And this! Look, you try it too!

effectEN:
Play this with COST  [Counter Blast (1)]!
If your vanguard is "Heavy Artillery of Dust Storm, Eugene", choose one of your vanguards, it gets [Power]+10000 until end of that battle, at the end of that battle, choose one of the rear-guards that boosted for that battle, and retire it.
flavorTextEN: We'll make you fully regret your decision, for forcing us to bare our fangs!!

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit's attack hits, COST  [retire this unit], draw a card, choose one of your opponent's rear-guards, and retire it.
flavorTextEN: Its main body, is the largest shell among all.

nameEN: Dragritter Girl of Flame Blossoms, Radylina
effectEN:
[ACT](RC):If you do not have a Momokke token, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and call up to one Momokke token to (RC).
[Glitter]-"Rorowa" (Active if your vanguard is a [Glitter] with "Rorowa" in its card name)
[AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], choose one of your token units in the same column as this unit, and this unit gets the [Power] of that unit until end of that battle. (Includes increased values)
flavorTextEN: Let's go, Momokke!

effectEN:
Play this with COST  [Soul Blast (1)]!
Choose one of your units in the [overDress] state, and until end of turn, it gets "[AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks a vanguard, Counter Charge (1).".
flavorTextEN: Unlimited power to deliver prayers is unleashed.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed by riding from "In the Calm Sunlight, Tamayura", choose up to one card with "Ririmi" or "Rarami" in its card name from your drop, and put it into your hand.
[Glitter](This card is a [Glitter] which seeks the Fire Regalis)
flavorTextEN:
No matter who they are,
those who threaten us shall not be forgiven.

effectEN:
Play this card with COST  [Soul Blast (2)] if you have a vanguard with "Tamayura" in its card name!
Choose one of your vanguards, and it gets "[CONT](VC):All of your opponent's front row units get [Power]-10000." until end of turn.
flavorTextEN:
(D-BT05): There are lives that shine magnificently
because they are fleeting.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [Soul Blast (1)], choose a normal unit with "Stealth" in its card name or  [Glitter] from your drop, and put it into your soul.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) by your vanguard's ability, this unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit intercepts, if your opponent's vanguard is grade 3 or greater, this unit gets [Shield]+10000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [Counter Blast (1)], look at the top seven cards of your deck, reveal up to one card with "Overlord" in its card name and put it into your hand, and shuffle your deck. If you did not reveal a card, Counter Charge (1).
[AUTO](RC):When your vanguard with "Overlord" in its card name attacks, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Alongside its overlord, the demonic dragon continues to support its glory.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this card is discarded from your hand during your battle phase, put this card into your soul, choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Oh, blazing soul... For eternity.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose one of your vanguards, and it gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: You shall be the one to take on my flames.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of that battle for each Arms on your (VC).
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), perform all of the following according to the Arms on your (VC).
• Right Deity Arms ‐ This unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn.
• Left Deity Arms ‐ COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose a grade 1 or less card from your drop, and call it to (RC).
flavorTextEN: When the sun and moon cross paths, a bright future awaits the world.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [Soul Blast (1)], choose a normal unit with "Stealth" in its card name or  [Glitter] from your drop, and put it into your soul.
flavorTextEN: Crossing boundaries and creating connections.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit intercepts, if your opponent's vanguard is grade 3 or greater, this unit gets [Shield]+10000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: Such a majestic appearance, surely those who are strong cannot ignore it.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of that battle for each Arms card on your (VC).
flavorTextEN: Prayers that sought destruction became the resolution that struggles against despair.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) by your vanguard's ability, this unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Allow me to carve up that life of yours which opposes my lord.

effectEN:
[X-overDress]-One "Trickstar" and one <Prayer Dragon> unit (You may place it by stacking it on all of the specified units instead of normal calling it to (RC))
[CONT](RC):If this unit is in the [X-overDress] state, this unit gets [Power]+10000, and for the battle this unit attacked, when your opponent would call cards from their hand to (GC), they must call two or more at the same time. (Active on opponent's turn too)
flavorTextEN: The two powers overlap, and from them a single new miracle is born.

effectEN:
[X-overDress]-One "Trickstar" and one <Prayer Dragon> unit (You may place it by stacking it on all of the specified units instead of normal calling it to (RC))
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) in the [X-overDress] state, choose a card with the [X-overDress] ability from your drop other than "Steel Wall Equip, Biruz Vairina", and put it into your hand.
[CONT](RC/GC):If this unit is in the [X-overDress] state, this unit cannot be chosen by your opponent's card effects, and gets [Power]+5000/[Shield]+10000. (Active on opponent's turn too)
flavorTextEN: Never waver no matter what comes in your way.

effectEN: All of this card's abilities are currently unknown.
[ACT](RC)1/Turn :COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose one of your vanguards, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When your vanguard attacks, if your opponent has two or less rear-guards, COST  [put this unit into your soul], choose one of your vanguards, and it gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: All of it, for the sake of confirming their victory. The hearts of the warriors unite as one.

effectEN:
Play this with COST  [Counter Blast (1) & discard a card from your hand]!
Choose two cards with the [X-overDress] ability from your drop, and put them into your hand.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon by "Chakrabarthi Phoenix Dragon, Nirvana Jheva", look at the top seven cards of your deck, choose up to one <Prayer Dragon> from among them, reveal it and put it into your hand, and shuffle your deck.
[CONT](RC):During your turn, if you have a <Prayer Dragon> unit in the same column as this unit, this unit gets [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: If a new future will be hatched, then we shall protect it.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this card becomes an originalDress, choose one of this card's outerDress units, until end of turn, it gets [Power]+5000, and if the outerDress is "Jeweled Sword Equip, Garou Vairina", it gets [Power]+5000. (An outerDress is the unit that this card is the originalDress of)
flavorTextEN: Destruction and protection. Those powers lie within the swords in those two arms.

effectEN:
[CONT](RC):During your turn, if you have two or more Arms on your (VC), this unit gets [Power]+5000.
[AUTO](Drop):When your unit is placed from drop to (RC), if your vanguard is "Sealed Blaze Maiden, Bavsargra", COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and call this card to (RC).
flavorTextEN: Sometimes, the moon watches over the harsh world.

effectEN: [ACT](RC):COST  [Counter Blast (1) & Put this unit into your soul], choose one of your vanguards, and it gets "[AUTO](VC):When this unit's attack hits a vanguard, draw a card, and Counter Charge (1)." until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Everchanging flames shall dye the battlefield red.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this card becomes an originalDress, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose a grade 1 or less <Prayer Dragon> from your drop, and call it to (RC).
flavorTextEN: Bind these weapons with prayers.

effectEN: All of this card's abilities are currently unknown.
[AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks a vanguard, if you have a rear-guard with two or more originalDress,  this unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: Cumulated prayers shall become definitive power.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this card becomes an originalDress, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], Soul Charge (1), choose one of your opponent's rear-guards, and retire it.
flavorTextEN: Imminent threats can become the turning point to reverse situations.

effectEN:
Play this with COST  [Counter Blast (2)]!
Choose one of your rear-guards with originalDress, and it gets [Critical]+1 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: A new hope is born, and the blades ensure that the light does not fade away.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), until end of turn, all of your opponent's rear-guards lose all of their [CONT] abilities, and cannot gain them. Then, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose one of your opponent's rear-guards in the same column as this unit, and retire it.
[CONT](RC):During your turn, if your opponent's vanguard is grade 3 or greater and they have no rear-guards, this unit gets [Power]+10000.
flavorTextEN: If you're winning in numbers, then all that's left is to widen the gap.

effectEN:
Play this with COST  [Counter Blast (1) & discard a card from hand]!
Choose two cards from your drop with the [X-overDress] ability, and put them into your hand.
flavorTextEN: The same, singular prayer that is repeated every time the eyes close.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [Counter Blast (2)], choose one of your opponent's (RC), and bind all of the cards on the chosen (RC).
flavorTextEN: You lowlifes who invade the empire. Quickly scatter, explode, and burn yourselves up!

effectEN:
[X-overDress]-One "Trickstar" and one <Prayer Dragon> unit (You may place it by stacking it on all of the specified units instead of normal calling it to (RC))
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) in the [X-overDress] state, choose a card with the [X-overDress] ability from your drop other than "Sturdy Wall Equip, Vils Vairina", and put it into your hand.
[CONT](RC/GC):If this unit is in the [X-overDress] state, this unit cannot be chosen by your opponent's card effects, and gets [Power]+5000/[Shield]+10000. (Active on opponent's turn too)
flavorTextEN: Never wavering, no matter what attacks.

effectEN: [ACT](RC)1/Turn :COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose one of your vanguards, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: If its to blow them away then it’s the perfect job for me!

nameEN: Thunder Bullet of Dust Storm, Sadid
effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) or put on (GC), if you have more rear-guards than your opponent, this unit gets [Power]+5000/[Shield]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

nameEN: Spear Knight of Tinkling Scales, Rimuzveet
effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is retired from (RC) or (GC), if your vanguard is a [Glitter], you may put this card into your soul.
flavorTextEN: My spear is my pride! Like the breath of a dragon that never falters!

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) from bind zone, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
{AUTO}(RC):When this unit attacks, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], choose a card from your opponent's bind zone, and put it on the bottom of their deck.
flavorTextEN: Nock the arrow of death. And slay the enemy general's head.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (VC), look at the top five cards from your deck, choose up to two normal units with "Stealth" in their card names from among them, reveal them, put one of the revealed cards into your soul, call the rest of the revealed cards to (RC), and shuffle your deck.
[ACT](Bind Zone):If you have a grade 2 or greater vanguard with "Stealth" in its card name, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], and call this card to (RC).
flavorTextEN: There are no digressions to the road of rogues.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks a vanguard, if you persona rode this turn, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], choose one of your opponent's rear-guards, retire it, and this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of that battle. Your opponent chooses three normal units from their drop, bind them. ("If you persona rode" is active even if persona ride activated outside normal riding)
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) from hand, if you have a vanguard with "Bavsargra" in its card name, COST  [Soul Blast (1) & discard a card from hand], search your deck or drop for up to one Arms card, reveal it and put it into your hand, and if you searched your deck, shuffle your deck.
[ACT](RC)1/Turn :COST  [Counter Blast (1) & put an Arms card from (VC) into soul], draw a card, and this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Grasp with that hand, the thoughts that remain true no matter when.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) from deck, this unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This is the surprising and shocking dobububububuuuurn♪

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) from hand, if you have a vanguard with "Nirvana" in its card name, COST  [Counter Blast (1) & put a card with "Vairina" in its card name from drop on the bottom of the deck], look at the top five cards of your deck, choose up to one card from among them with "Vairina" in its card name, reveal it and put it into your hand, and shuffle your deck. If you did not reveal a card, Counter Charge (1).
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

nameEN: Lightning Bullet of Dust Storm, Sadiid
effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) or put on (GC), if you have more rear-guards than your opponent, this unit gets [Power]+5000/[Shield]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Try to dodge this barrage if you can!

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks a vanguard, if your opponent has three or less rear-guards, COST  [Soul Blast (2)], and this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of that battle. If your opponent has one or less rear-guards, it gets +10000 instead of +5000.
flavorTextEN: A heated and intense, resplendant dance of prayers.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this card becomes an originalDress, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose a grade 1 or less <Prayer Dragon> from your drop, and call it to (RC).
flavorTextEN: Bind these weapons with prayers.

flavorTextEN: Imminent threats can become the turning point to reverse situations.

Play this with COST  [Counter Blast (2)]!
Choose one of your rear-guards with originalDress, and it gets [Critical]+1 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: A new hope is born, and the blades ensure that the light does not fade away.

nameEN: Flame Knight of Green Scales, Steidle
effectEN: [CONT](Front Row RC):If your vanguard was not attacked this turn, all of your rear-guards cannot be hit.

effectEN:
[CONT](GC):If your soul has a card with "Overlord" in its card name, this unit gets [Shield]+5000.
[ACT](RC):If your opponent's vanguard is grade 3 or greater, COST  [retire this unit], choose a grade 3 card with "Overlord" in its card name from your drop, and put it into your soul.
flavorTextEN: A treasure tells the past only to those who have overcome the trial.

effectEN:
[X-overDress]-One "Trickstar" and one <Prayer Dragon> unit (You may place it by stacking it on all of the specified units instead of normal calling it to (RC))
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) by [X-overDress], choose up to two cards with "Vairina" in their card names from your drop, put them as this unit's originalDress.
[AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, if this unit is in the [X-overDress] state, this unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of that battle. Then, COST  [put one of this unit's originalDress with "Vairina" in its card name into drop], and perform "draw a card" or "Counter Charge (1)".
flavorTextEN: Illuminating the darkness with endless light, it reflects the true wish.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this card is put into soul from deck or (RC) during your turn, COST  [bind this card], and Soul Charge (1).

flavorTextEN: You lowlifes who invade the empire. Quickly scatter, explode, and burn yourselves up!

flavorTextEN: My spear is my pride! Like the breath of a dragon that never falters!

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if you have a vanguard with "Gandiva" in its card name, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose one of your opponent's rear-guards, and retire it. If you did not retire, draw a card, choose a card from your drop, and bind it face down.

nameEN: Great Flame Axe of Magnificent Scales, Calgafran
effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this card is discarded from hand during your ride phase, COST  [Soul Blast (1) & put this card on the bottom of deck], and draw a card.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if you have three or more Dragontree markers on (RC), COST  [Soul Blast (1)], choose one of your opponent's rear-guards in the same column as this unit, and retire it.

nameEN: Signature Bullet of Dust Storm, Baxter
effectEN:
[CONT](RC):During the battle this unit is attacked by your opponent's unit other than in the same column as this unit, this unit cannot be hit.
[AUTO](RC):When your opponent's rear-guard in the same column as this unit is retired during your turn, choose one of your vanguards, and that unit and this unit get [Power]+5000 until end of turn.

effectEN: [ACT](RC):COST  [Bind this unit], choose up to two face up cards from your opponent's bind zone, and your opponent put them on the bottom of their deck in any order. If you chose two cards with this effect, choose one of your vanguards, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.

effectEN: Choose one of your guardians without sentinel, until end of that battle, it gets "[AUTO]:When this unit is retired from (GC), put this card into hand.", and [Shield]+10000.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle this unit attacked, COST  [Counter Blast (1) & Soul Blast (1)], choose one of your opponent's front row rear-guards, retire it, and if your vanguard is "Chakrabarthi Divine Dragon, Nirvana", choose up to one grade 0 card from your drop, and call it to (RC).
flavorTextEN: We're here with you. Don't worry and go ahead!

effectEN:
[ACT](VC)1/Turn :COST  [Discard a card from your hand], choose a grade 0 card from your drop, and call it to (RC). 
[AUTO](VC):When this unit attacks, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and this unit and all of your units with the [overDress] ability get [Power]+10000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: O Chakrabarthi, carry the prayers and illuminate the world.

effectEN:
[CONT](VC/RC):During the battle this unit attacked a rear-guard, your opponent cannot call cards from their hand to (GC).
[AUTO](VC)1/Turn :When this unit's attack hits, COST  [Counter-Blast 1 & discard a card from your hand], [Stand] this unit, and it gets drive -1 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: The dragon of apocalypse carved its name into various annals of history.

effectEN: [CONT](RC):During the battle this unit attacked, this unit gets [Power]+2000.
flavorTextEN: These hellish flames shall disintegrate all walls.

nameEN: Heavy Artillery of Dust Storm, Eugene
effectEN:
[ACT](VC)1/Turn :COST  [[Rest] two rear-guards], choose one of your opponent's rear-guards, retire it, and this unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn.
[ACT](VC)1/Turn :If your opponent's rear-guard was retired this turn, COST  [Soul Blast (5)], look at the same number of cards from the top of your deck as the number of your opponent's open (RC), choose any number of unit cards from among them, call them to (RC), and put the rest into your soul.
flavorTextEN: You can do as you wish after this. It will not affect our victory.

effectEN:
Play this with COST  [discard a card with the [overDress] ability from your hand]!
Draw two cards.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When your vanguard attacks, if your opponent has two or less rear-guards, COST  [put this unit into your soul], choose one of your vanguards, and it gets [Critical]+1 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: Dinodragons instinctively cooperate with each other.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if you have a unit in the [overDress] state, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose one of your opponent's rear-guards, and retire it.
flavorTextEN: Not enough training. Go and start over from before you were born!

effectEN:
Play this with COST  [Counter Blast one or more cards]!
Choose one of your opponent's rear-guards for each Counter Blast paid for this cost, and retire it.
flavorTextEN: Sunlight banishes the night, and shines the way forth to the hope beyond.

effectEN:
[overDress]-Unit in the [overDress] state (You may place it by stacking it on the specified unit instead of normal calling it to (RC))
[CONT](RC):This unit gets the original [Power] of all of its originalDress. (Active on opponent's turn too)
[AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks a grade 3 or greater vanguard, if this unit is in the [overDress] state, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and this unit gets [Power]+15000/[Critical]+1 until end of that battle. At the end of that battle, put all of this unit's originalDress into the drop. ([overDress] state ends if there is no originalDress)
flavorTextEN: Prayers are, a strong will to break through the impossible.

effectEN:
[overDress]-"Trickstar", or a grade 3 or less unit in the [overDress] state (You may place it by stacking it on the specified unit instead of normal calling it to (RC))
[CONT](RC):This unit gets [Power]+5000 for each of this unit's originalDress.
[AUTO](RC)1/Turn :When the attack of this unit in the [overDress] state hits, COST  [Counter Blast (1) & discard a card from your hand], and [Stand] this unit.
flavorTextEN: Prayers have the power to change the world.

Blurb: Now is the time to reveal Mirei Minae's main unit for Vanguard overDress season 2!

[AUTO](VC)1/Turn :When this unit is Armed, Soul Charge (1), choose a grade 1 or less card from your drop, and call it to (RC).
[ACT](VC)1/Turn :If this unit is Armed with two or more cards, COST  [Soul Blast (2)], retire all of your opponent's front row rear-guards, and this unit gets [Critical]+1 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: That which torments the body are prayers of despair. That which dwells in the body is the blaze of thirst.

effectEN:
Right Deity Arms - "Sealed Blaze Maiden, Bavsargra" (After being played, the specified vanguard Arms it. If a new Right Deity Arms is Armed, put this card into the drop)
Play this with COST  [Soul Blast (1)]!
[AUTO](VC):When the unit Armed with this card attacks, that Armed unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of that battle. At the end of that battle, if your opponent's damage zone has four or less cards, COST  [Counter Blast (2) & put this card into your drop], choose one of your opponent's vanguards, and deal one damage.
flavorTextEN: The despair of an era without prayers becomes a blade that will destroy the world.

effectEN:
Left Deity Arms - "Sealed Blaze Maiden, Bavsargra" (After being played, the specified vanguard Arms it. If a new Left Deity Arms is Armed, put this card into the drop)
Play this with COST  [Counter Blast (1)]!
[AUTO](VC)1/Turn :When the unit Armed with this card is attacked, that Armed unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: A maiden holding on to despair departs on a journey while bearing it all.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this card is discarded from hand during your turn, if your vanguard is "Chakrabarthi Divine Dragon, Nirvana", COST  [Soul Blast (1)], choose one of your opponent's rear-guards, and retire it.
flavorTextEN: The prayers will come true. Here be off. While your heart burns on.

effectEN: Choose one of your vanguards, and until end of turn, it gets "[AUTO](VC):When your opponent's rear-guard is retired during your main phase, you draw a card.".
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [CONT]:This unit is persona rode even if it was normal rode upon by a unit with different card name from hand.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
Play this with COST  [discard a card with the [overDress] ability from your hand]!
Draw two cards.
flavorTextEN: At the break of dawn, Rino's group leaves with the egg on a journey to gather hope.

nameEN: Piercing Bullet of Dust Storm, Maynard
effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (VC) or (RC), COST  [Counter Blast (2)], choose one of your opponent's rear-guards, and retire all of your opponent's rear-guards in the same column as that unit.
flavorTextEN: That bullet will not stop until it digs deep into its prey.

effectEN:
Play this with COST  [Counter Blast (1)]!
Choose one of your vanguards, and until end of turn, it gets, "[AUTO](VC):When your rear-guard is placed, if it was an [overDress], draw a card, and this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.".
flavorTextEN: A responding radiance, that becomes the hope to save the world...!

effectEN:
Left Deity Arms - "Sealed Blaze Maiden, Bavsargra" (After being played, the specified vanguard Arms it. If a new Left Deity Arms is Armed, put this card into the drop)
Play this with COST  [Soul Blast (1)]!
[AUTO](VC):When the unit Armed with this card attacks, COST  [Counter Blast (2)], and the unit Armed with this card gets drive +1 until end of that battle. At the end of that battle, put this card into your drop.
flavorTextEN: Release the flames, the trigger of rejection.

effectEN:
Right Deity Arms - "Sealed Blaze Maiden, Bavsargra" (After being played, the specified vanguard Arms it. If a new Right Deity Arms is Armed, put this card into the drop)
